mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.accept_status, o.delivery_status, o.created_at FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.customer_deleted = 0 ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND payment_status = 'PAID' AND customer_deleted = 0

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.accept_status, o.delivery_status, o.created_at FROM orders o WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.customer_deleted = 0

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.kit_id, o.business_id, oi.quantity, oi.price, COALESCE(k.name, '개인거래 상품') AS product_name, k.main_image1 AS image_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM review r WHERE r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id) AS reviewed FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN kit k ON k.kit_id = oi.kit_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, kit_id, quantity, price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{kitId}, #{quantity}, #{price})
